title: trifolium pseudostriatum
intro: Trifolium pseudostriatum, also known as the false red clover, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It contains isoflavones, a class of phytoestrogens with medicinal properties that may help alleviate menopausal symptoms, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The health benefits of Trifolium pseudostriatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve bone density, and support cardiovascular health. Trifolium pseudostriatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
